models.name: 通用线性规划（General LP）
models.description: 标准形式的线性规划：min/max c^T x，subject to Ax <= b, x >= 0
constraints: sum(a_ij * x_j) <= b_i  for all i
models.template_code:
import gurobipy as gp
from gurobipy import GRB

m = gp.Model('LP')
# 定义变量
x = m.addVars(n, lb=0, name='x')
# 设置目标函数
m.setObjective(gp.quicksum(c[i]*x[i] for i in range(n)), GRB.MINIMIZE)
# 添加约束
for i in range(len(b)):
    m.addConstr(gp.quicksum(A[i][j]*x[j] for j in range(n)) <= b[i])
m.optimize()

models.name: 整数线性规划（ILP）
models.description: 决策变量为整数或二元变量的线性规划
variables: x_i: 整数或二元决策变量
constraints: sum(a_ij * x_j) <= b_i  for all i
x_i in {0,1} 或 x_i >= 0 整数
models.template_code:
import gurobipy as gp
from gurobipy import GRB

m = gp.Model('ILP')
# 定义整数变量
x = m.addVars(n, vtype=GRB.BINARY, name='x')  # 或 GRB.INTEGER
# 目标函数
m.setObjective(gp.quicksum(c[i]*x[i] for i in range(n)), GRB.MINIMIZE)
# 约束
for i in range(len(b)):
    m.addConstr(gp.quicksum(A[i][j]*x[j] for j in range(n)) <= b[i])
m.optimize()

models.name: 运输问题（Transportation Problem）
models.description: 将货物从 m 个产地运到 n 个销地，使总运输成本最小
variables: x_ij: 从产地 i 运往销地 j 的数量
constraints: sum_j(x_ij) = supply_i  for all i  （产地供给约束）
sum_i(x_ij) = demand_j  for all j  （销地需求约束）
models.solver_hint: gurobipy addVars((sources, sinks), lb=0), supply/demand constraints
models.template_code:
import gurobipy as gp
from gurobipy import GRB

m = gp.Model('Transportation')
x = m.addVars(sources, sinks, lb=0, name='x')
m.setObjective(gp.quicksum(cost[i,j]*x[i,j] for i in sources for j in sinks), GRB.MINIMIZE)
for i in sources:
    m.addConstr(gp.quicksum(x[i,j] for j in sinks) == supply[i])
for j in sinks:
    m.addConstr(gp.quicksum(x[i,j] for i in sources) == demand[j])
m.optimize()

models.name: 指派问题（Assignment Problem）
models.description: 将 n 个任务分配给 n 个执行者，每人恰好执行一个任务，最小化总成本
variables: x_ij ∈ {0,1}: 是否将任务 j 分配给执行者 i
constraints: sum_j(x_ij) = 1  for all i  （每个执行者恰好一个任务）
sum_i(x_ij) = 1  for all j  （每个任务恰好一个执行者）
models.solver_hint: gurobipy addVars with GRB.BINARY, row/column sum constraints
models.template_code:
import gurobipy as gp
from gurobipy import GRB

m = gp.Model('Assignment')
x = m.addVars(workers, tasks, vtype=GRB.BINARY, name='x')
m.setObjective(gp.quicksum(cost[i,j]*x[i,j] for i in workers for j in tasks), GRB.MINIMIZE)
for i in workers:
    m.addConstr(gp.quicksum(x[i,j] for j in tasks) == 1)
for j in tasks:
    m.addConstr(gp.quicksum(x[i,j] for i in workers) == 1)
m.optimize()

models.name: 背包问题（Knapsack Problem）
models.description: 在容量限制下，选择物品使总价值最大
variables: x_i ∈ {0,1}: 是否选择物品 i
models.solver_hint: gurobipy addVars with GRB.BINARY, single capacity constraint
models.template_code:
import gurobipy as gp
from gurobipy import GRB

m = gp.Model('Knapsack')
x = m.addVars(n_items, vtype=GRB.BINARY, name='x')
m.setObjective(gp.quicksum(value[i]*x[i] for i in range(n_items)), GRB.MAXIMIZE)
m.addConstr(gp.quicksum(weight[i]*x[i] for i in range(n_items)) <= capacity)
m.optimize()

models.name: 选址问题（Facility Location）
models.description: 决定开设哪些设施，使总固定成本和服务成本最小
variables: y_j ∈ {0,1}: 是否在 j 处开设设施
x_ij ∈ {0,1}: 是否由设施 j 服务顾客 i
constraints: sum_j(x_ij) = 1  for all i  （每个顾客恰好被一个设施服务）
x_ij <= y_j  for all i,j  （只有开设的设施才能服务）
models.solver_hint: gurobipy two sets of binary vars, linking constraints
models.template_code:
import gurobipy as gp
from gurobipy import GRB

m = gp.Model('FacilityLocation')
y = m.addVars(facilities, vtype=GRB.BINARY, name='y')
x = m.addVars(customers, facilities, vtype=GRB.BINARY, name='x')
m.setObjective(
    gp.quicksum(fixed_cost[j]*y[j] for j in facilities) +
    gp.quicksum(service_cost[i,j]*x[i,j] for i in customers for j in facilities),
    GRB.MINIMIZE
)
for i in customers:
    m.addConstr(gp.quicksum(x[i,j] for j in facilities) == 1)
for i in customers:
    for j in facilities:
        m.addConstr(x[i,j] <= y[j])
m.optimize()
